Simple Process

Four Steps to 5,000 Doors

01
Claim Your Spot

Check availability for your industry and lock in your territory. Once you're in, competitors are out for the duration of your package.

02
We Design Your Ad

Our team creates a high-impact ad built around your best offer. Included at no extra cost — you just approve it.

03
We Mail Westlake

Premium glossy 8.5×11 cards land in 5,000 Westlake Hills mailboxes via USPS EDDM. $200K+ average household income.

04
Your Phone Rings

Westlake homeowners see your exclusive offer — nobody else in your industry is on the card. Track your calls and renew before your spot opens up.

Why It Works

Top-of-Mind in the Wealthiest
Zip Code in Austin

Physical mail can't be scrolled past

Digital ads get blocked, skipped, and forgotten in seconds. A glossy oversized card sits on the counter for 30 days. That's 30 days of brand exposure for the price of one ad slot.

30
Days average household retention
Exclusivity is the product

ValPak puts 3 plumbers in the same envelope. We put one. The moment you claim your spot, your competitors are locked out for the length of your package. That's not a feature — it's the whole model.

90
Days competitor lockout — Celebrity Package
$150 giveaway drives engagement

Every drop includes a $150 cash giveaway. Homeowners scan the QR code to enter — meaning they're actively interacting with the card. No other Westlake mailer does this.

5K
Homeowners scanning your ad to enter
$200K+ average household income

Westlake Hills 78746 is one of the wealthiest zip codes in Texas. These are the homeowners who actually hire — and pay — for quality services. Every card goes to this exact audience.

$200K+
Average household income, Westlake Hills
The 3% Rule

Most of Your Market Isn't Buying Today — But They Will Be

At any given moment, only 3% of your market is actively looking to buy. The other 97% are "not looking right now" — but they will be eventually.

When that 97% is finally ready, who do they call? The business that's been sitting on their kitchen counter for 30 days.

By sharing a premium card with other local businesses, you get 100% of the visibility for your industry — at a fraction of the cost of solo direct mail.

Your investment 5,000 Westlake Homes for as low as $267/drop
